name: UN Tourism Statutes 1970/1975 (UN Tourism — formerly UNWTO)
summary: The United Nations Tourism (UN Tourism) — formerly United Nations World Tourism Organization UNWTO — is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-UN-Tourism framework adopted by the UNWTO Statutes — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-tourism framework + only UN specialized agency operating on tourism framework (UNWTO Statutes adopted 27 September 1970 in Mexico City + effective 2 January 1975 + International Union of Official Travel Organizations IUOTO 1947 predecessor + UN specialized agency from 23 December 2003 + renamed UN Tourism January 2024 framework — formal foundational UN Tourism treaty framework establishing comprehensive UN Tourism organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-tourism framework + only UN specialized agency operating on tourism framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IUOTO 1947 predecessor framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal World Tourism Day 27 September framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Global Code of Ethics for Tourism 1999 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal UN Tourism Convention on Protection of Tourists 2024 framework via UN Tourism General Assembly resolution Riyadh 2023 + adopted 18 November 2024 + opened for signature 18 November 2024 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Sustainable Tourism Network framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Zurab Pololikashvili UN Tourism Secretary-General 2018-2025 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Russia-withdrew 27 April 2022 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal renamed UN Tourism January 2024 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-administration-UN-Tourism-funding-cuts 2025 framework). The UN Tourism Statutes is binding upon 161 UN Tourism member states + 6 associate members + 500+ affiliate members private-sector framework as of 2026 with notable non-members United States never-joined + Russia-withdrew-2022 + Australia + Canada + New Zealand + Norway + Sweden + Finland + Denmark + Belgium + Estonia + Latvia + Lithuania + Luxembourg framework — substantial coverage framework. The Statutes are silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal UN Tourism Global Code of Ethics for Tourism + Protection of Tourists Convention 2024 framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-children-tourism + child-sex-tourism prevention framework + Code Article 8 Sustainable Tourism + Article 10 right of children to be protected from exploitation framework. The UN Tourism General Assembly + UN Tourism Executive Council + UN Tourism Secretary-General + UN Tourism Secretariat are the formal UN Tourism bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The UN Tourism Statutes is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: UNWTO Statutes
statutory_framework.relevance: UNWTO Statutes adopted 27 September 1970 in Mexico City + effective 2 January 1975 — formal foundational UN Tourism treaty framework establishing comprehensive UN Tourism organisation framework.

statutory_framework.title: UN Tourism UN Specialized Agency Status
statutory_framework.relevance: UN Tourism became UN specialized agency 23 December 2003 — formal UN Tourism UN specialized agency framework.

statutory_framework.citation: Global Code of Ethics for Tourism 1999
statutory_framework.title: Global Code of Ethics for Tourism
statutory_framework.relevance: Global Code of Ethics for Tourism adopted 1 October 1999 at UN Tourism 13th General Assembly Santiago Chile — formal foundational Global Code of Ethics for Tourism framework.

statutory_framework.citation: UN Tourism Convention on Protection of Tourists 2024
statutory_framework.title: UN Tourism Convention on Protection of Tourists
statutory_framework.relevance: UN Tourism Convention on Protection of Tourists adopted 18 November 2024 + opened for signature 18 November 2024 — formal foundational UN Tourism Convention on Protection of Tourists framework + first binding international convention on tourism framework.

statutory_framework.title: UN Tourism renamed
statutory_framework.relevance: UN World Tourism Organization UNWTO renamed UN Tourism January 2024 — formal UN Tourism renaming framework.

apex_courts.name: UN Tourism General Assembly
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for UN Tourism.

apex_courts.name: UN Tourism Executive Council
apex_courts.role: Formal executive body for UN Tourism composed of 34 members.

apex_courts.name: UN Tourism Secretary-General
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for UN Tourism — Zurab Pololikashvili Georgia UN Tourism Secretary-General 2018-2025+ framework.

apex_courts.name: UN Tourism Secretariat
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative body for UN Tourism.

anonymisation_convention: UN Tourism-related communications operate via state-state framework via UN Tourism General Assembly + Executive Council; individual communications not formally accepted under UN Tourism framework + private-sector engagement via UN Tourism Affiliate Members framework.

key_developments.title: IUOTO International Union of Official Travel Organizations
key_developments.description: International Union of Official Travel Organizations IUOTO established 1947 — predecessor framework to UN Tourism.

key_developments.title: UNWTO Statutes adopted
key_developments.description: UNWTO Statutes adopted 27 September 1970 in Mexico City — formal foundational UN Tourism treaty framework adopted + 27 September World Tourism Day framework.

key_developments.title: UNWTO Statutes enter force
key_developments.description: UNWTO Statutes entered force 2 January 1975 — formal foundational UN Tourism treaty framework operational.

key_developments.title: UN Tourism Headquartered Madrid
key_developments.description: UN Tourism Headquartered Madrid Spain 1976 — formal UN Tourism Madrid HQ framework operational.

key_developments.title: World Tourism Day 27 September commemorated
key_developments.description: World Tourism Day commemorated 27 September 1979 — formal World Tourism Day framework operational.

key_developments.title: Global Code of Ethics for Tourism
key_developments.description: Global Code of Ethics for Tourism adopted 1 October 1999 at UN Tourism 13th General Assembly Santiago Chile — formal foundational Global Code of Ethics for Tourism framework operational.

key_developments.title: UN Tourism becomes UN specialized agency
key_developments.description: UN Tourism became UN specialized agency 23 December 2003 by UN General Assembly Resolution A/RES/58/232 — formal UN Tourism UN specialized agency framework operational.

key_developments.title: Zurab Pololikashvili UN Tourism Secretary-General
key_developments.description: Zurab Pololikashvili Georgia became UN Tourism Secretary-General 1 January 2018 — formal Zurab Pololikashvili framework operational.

key_developments.title: Russia-withdrew + Ukraine war
key_developments.description: Russia withdrew from UN Tourism 27 April 2022 + Russia-Ukraine war framework — formal Russia-UN-Tourism-withdrawal framework operational.

key_developments.title: UN Tourism renamed + Convention on Protection of Tourists adopted
key_developments.description: UN World Tourism Organization UNWTO renamed UN Tourism January 2024 + UN Tourism Convention on Protection of Tourists adopted 18 November 2024 + opened for signature 18 November 2024 — formal UN Tourism renamed + Convention adopted framework operational + first binding international convention on tourism framework.

key_developments.title: Trump-UN-Tourism-cuts + UN80
key_developments.description: Trump-administration-UN-Tourism-funding-cuts 2025 + UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework — formal Trump-cuts + UN80 framework operational.

structural_findings: UN Tourism Statutes operates a supranational global binding-treaty framework — places UN Tourism Statutes in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-tourism framework + only UN specialized agency operating on tourism framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-tourism framework + only UN specialized agency operating on tourism framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IUOTO 1947 predecessor framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal World Tourism Day 27 September framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Global Code of Ethics for Tourism 1999 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal UN Tourism Convention on Protection of Tourists 2024 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Sustainable Tourism Network framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Zurab Pololikashvili UN Tourism Secretary-General 2018-2025 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Russia-withdrew 27 April 2022 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal renamed UN Tourism January 2024 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-UN-Tourism-cuts 2025 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal US-never-joined + Russia-Australia-Canada-NZ-Norway-Sweden-Finland-Denmark-Belgium-Estonia-Latvia-Lithuania-Luxembourg non-membership framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Global Code of Ethics for Tourism 1999 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Global Code of Ethics for Tourism framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UN Tourism Convention on Protection of Tourists 2024 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal first binding international convention on tourism framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal UN Tourism renamed framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal UN Tourism renamed January 2024 framework.
161 UN Tourism member state + 6 associate member + 500+ affiliate member ratification framework with notable non-members is structurally distinctive globally — substantial coverage framework.

1947 IUOTO + 1970 UNWTO Statutes + 1975 entry into force + 1976 Madrid HQ + 1979 World Tourism Day + 1999 Global Code of Ethics + 2003 UN specialized agency + 2018 Zurab Pololikashvili + 2022 Russia-withdrew + 2024 UN Tourism renamed + Convention on Protection of Tourists + 2025 Trump-cuts UN-Tourism-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

UN Tourism Statutes + Global Code of Ethics 1999 + Convention on Protection of Tourists 2024 + Sustainable Tourism Network + World Tourism Day formal quintet framework with formal cross-border-children-tourism + child-sex-tourism prevention + Code Article 8 + Article 10 right of children to be protected from exploitation PA-intersection framework.
